title: デビュー戦の後に・仕掛ける

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky successfully makes her debut. As for
everyone's impressions of her, however...

text_block_list.name: Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
She's a pretty interesting runner, but... I can't
really tell if she's any good.

text_block_list.name: Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Probably a better idea to focus on the other racers. Now they're going places!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Betcha it's Spe and Grass hopping around in
everyone's mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite it raining on her debut day, Special Week
ran spectacularly, making her a hot topic among
her peers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Then there's the "Beast's Successor," Grass
Wonder, seen as the strongest of the juniors. And
that's not to mention the many other formidable
newcomers.
choice_data_list:
Guess there's no competing with the attention
they're getting.

Guess there's no competing with the attention
they're getting.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Sure... if attention's what you want. ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Of course, this is great. It's exactly what I asked
for!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
They can all keep up the hard work, so I can stay
hidden away in the shadows.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
That way, I can safely bide my time, secretly
gathering strength. ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Don't cause a fuss, don't make a sound... That's
how you reel in the biggest catch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a gleam in her eyes. She must be planning
to spend her junior year observing from afar while
sharpening her skills in the meantime. In that
case...
choice_data_list:
Let's gradually build your experience by
choosing races you're likely to win.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Nah, that's short-term thinking. See, there's an
alternative option. It's called "taking it easy."

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Figures... Why's "not racing" never the answer?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Anyway, I'm not sure about any easy-to-win races. Sure, it sounds simple, but is it really?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Maybe if I got a reward after each win, I'd have
the right motivation... Who knows, right?
choice_data_list: ...I'll add some nap time to your schedule.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I'm in!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: With that, she agrees to a measured racing approach until the start of her classic year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Then, on the way back to campus...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzzzzt!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh, a phone call. Give me a sec.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hello?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Whoa, quiet down. Yeah, okay... All right, thanks.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Right. Yep, I got it. Okay! Yeah. Yep. Byeee.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
That was a surprise. He always calls me outta the
blue.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Gramps. He was calling to congratulate me on my
debut.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
He was going overboard with the excitement. I
mean, this was just my debut.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Like, c'mon, Gramps, it's not that big of a deal...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She may say that, but I can tell she's happy to
have gotten the call.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Well, I am his adorable little granddaughter. ☆

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I know he loves me and all, but there's another
reason he was so happy.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ahem, that is confidential information. If you must know, you'll need to fill out and submit a request form.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She still doesn't want to tell me everything, but I
feel like I got a glimpse of a side of her she
seldom shows.
